bug_classification.reasoning: The issue describes code paths (bin/isdlc-embedding.js:231-243 and discover-orchestrator.md:2566 plus 2 more discovered during scan) that violate FR-006 contract by running unconditionally, silently bootstrapping embeddings even when the user opted out at install. 'Silently bootstrap', 'violates contract', and 'currently they run unconditionally' are bug signals. The fix is to add the missing hasUserEmbeddingsConfig() check.
